title: epilobium montanum subsp. collinum
intro: Epilobium montanum subsp. collinum, also known as alpine willowherb or mountain willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the willowherb family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which help to reduce swelling and relieve symptoms associated with urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Epilobium montanum subsp. collinum include its ability to support urinary health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Epilobium montanum subsp. collinum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for use in herbal remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
